name: Ricksoft Co., Ltd.
summary: Ricksoft Co., Ltd. engages in the provision of system integration, cloud, and software development services in Japan. The company's system integration services include system design, construction, customization, migration, etc.; and operation support, tool training, etc. It also develops project management tool comprising WBS Gantt-Chart for Jira; usability enhancement tool, such as Excel-Like Issue Editor for Jira; digital transformation support tool for Alfresco connector series; and other self-developing and software tools. In addition, the company engages in the sale of licenses. Ricksoft Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
